shopping_386.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:

The provided search results page (t-1) does not show an "Alcoholic Beverages" category in the "Shop By" filter options. shopping_386.REFLECTION: For future attempts, carefully break down the objective into all its conditions: product name ("Bud Light"), labeling status ("incorrectly labeled"), and category ("Alcoholic Beverages").
